subcodes.first_line: Unto all things hath been ordained sustenance from God, the Bestower, the Bountiful, the All-Generous. For the eye hath been ordained grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قدر لکل شیء غذآء من لدی الله المعطی المنعم الکریم قد قدر للعین نعمه
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
